Off Calendar Aug-29-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Defendant Jack Vognsen's Motion to Dismiss for failure to Serve an Amended Complaint after Demurrer is ordered off calendar. To be renoticed in the Law and Motion Department, Dept. 302/Court ordered case dismissed at the Miscellaneous Order to Show Cause Calendar this morning 8/28/2003. Proceedings reported by: Christina Paxton. (212)

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-29-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to all parties for failure to file Proof of Service, obtain answer or enter default is heard this day. Court ordered case dismissed without prejudice pursuant to Request for Dismissal without prejudice filed by plaintiff Mark Sokolsky on 8/14/2003. Proceedings reported by: Christina Paxton. (212)
